rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, explaining the benefits of reordering the paragraphs for better flow and clarity.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as not verifying the cited works or the numeric claims.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) dimensions without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; the agent identifies and avoids harmful patterns in the original by ensuring the reordering maintains logical flow and clarity.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, such as connective edits and forward reference replacements.
